services.name: Door Lock or Handle Install
services.description: Install new door knob, lever, deadbolt, or hinges. Hardware is not included in price.

services.name: Door Weatherstripping
services.description: Install weatherstripping or door sweep to stop drafts.

services.name: Door Prehung Install
services.description: Install a complete prehung interior door (frame + slab). Pricing does NOT include purchase of the door/ materials or hardware required.

services.name: Door Repair Impact Damage
services.description: Cosmetic repair via patch and fill for hollow-core or solid-core door with impact/physical (non-structural) damage

services.name: Window Hardware Repair
services.description: Fix casement cranks, double‑hung balances, locks, or handles.

services.name: Window Screen Repair
services.description: Patch hole or replace entire screen mesh.

services.name: Window Draft Sealing
services.description: Caulk and seal gaps around window frames.

services.name: Wall Hole or Crack Repair
services.description: Patch any size hole or crack in drywall. Painting included.

services.name: Plaster Wall Repair
services.description: Fix lathe & plaster or gypsum plaster walls.

services.name: Brick or Concrete Crack Repair
services.description: Fill cracks in interior brick, concrete, or mortar walls.

services.name: Wood Paneling Repair
services.description: Repair scratches, dents, or loose boards in wood paneling.

services.name: Squeaky Floor Repair
services.description: Eliminate squeaks in hardwood or laminate floors (from above).

services.name: Loose Tile Replacement
services.description: Replace cracked, loose, or missing floor or wall tile.

services.name: Baseboard Install
services.description: Install new baseboards or repair existing.

services.name: Cabinet Door or Drawer Adjustment
services.description: Align sagging cabinet doors or fix sticky drawers.

services.name: Cabinet Knob or Pull Install
services.description: Install new knobs, pulls, or handles on cabinets and drawers.

services.name: Furniture Repair (Hourly)
services.description: Fix broken frames, loose joints, or damaged surfaces.

services.name: Scratch or Water Ring Removal
services.description: Minimize scratches, water rings, or peeling veneer.

services.name: Furniture Repair ⏰Hourly
services.description: Fix broken furniture (frames, drawers, joints).

services.name: Furniture Disassembly for Moving
services.description: Take apart furniture for moving or storage.

services.name: Furniture Assembly Flat-Pack
services.description: Assemble IKEA or any ready‑to‑assemble furniture.

services.name: Blinds|Shades|Curtains ⏰ Buy-the-Hour
services.description: Install blinds, shades, curtains, or curtain rods.

services.name: Shelf Mounting Standard ⏰Buy-the-Hour
services.description: Mount shelves, picture frames, heavy mirrors, or wall art by the hour into drywall or plaster walls

services.name: Shelf Mortar Mounting ⏰Buy-the-Hour
services.description: Mount shelves, picture frames, heavy mirrors, or wall art by the hour into mortar, cement or brick walls

services.name: Smart Switch Install
services.description: Install WiFi or Z‑wave smart light switch.

services.name: GFCI Outlet Replacement

services.name: USB Outlet Install
services.description: Install outlet with built‑in USB ports.

services.name: Light Fixture Replacement
services.description: Replace existing light fixture with new one.

services.name: Chandelier or Pendant Install
services.description: Hang and wire chandelier or heavy pendant light.

services.name: Under‑Cabinet Light Install
services.description: Install LED strip or puck lights under cabinets.

services.name: High Ceiling Bulb Replacement
services.description: Replace bulbs in fixtures more than 10 feet high.

services.name: LED Bulb Upgrade
services.description: Replace old bulbs with energy‑efficient LEDs.

services.name: Ceiling Fan Install
services.description: Replace light fixture with ceiling fan (requires fan‑rated box).

services.name: Bathroom Exhaust Fan Replacement
services.description: Remove old bathroom fan and install new one (same size).
